description: Creates a monitor for specific network flows between local and remote resources to monitor network performance for workloads.

MonitorLocalResource.description: A local resource is the host where the agent is installed.

Type.description: The type of the local resource.
Type.markdownDescription:
The type of the local resource.

---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Allowed Values: AWS::EC2::VPC | AWS::AvailabilityZone | AWS::EC2::Subnet | AWS::Region | AWS::EKS::Cluster  
Update requires: No interruption

Identifier.description: The identifier of the local resource.
Identifier.markdownDescription:
The identifier of the local resource.

---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Update requires: No interruption

A local resource is the host where the agent is installed.

---

Required: No  
Update requires: No interruption
